title: Significance and measurement of capacity utilisation
summary: 9609 AS — capacity utilisation ratio and operational implications.
learningObjectives: Explain effects of under- and over-utilisation.

simpleExplanation.title: Using what you have
simpleExplanation.summary: Capacity utilisation compares actual output to maximum possible output. Low utilisation wastes fixed costs; very high may cause bottlenecks.
steps: Low: spread fixed costs over fewer units.
High: efficient but may harm quality.

sections.content: **Capacity utilisation** (4.3.1) uses simple **percentage calculations**. Link low utilisation to **unit cost rise**.
